releasedThisWeek.title: RAVEPOP
releasedThisWeek.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 电子与流行碰撞的狂欢，适合舞池与耳机双栖体验。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A rave-pop collision that works both on the dancefloor and in your headphones.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 以狂野的电子节拍包裹流行旋律，充满实验性的音效设计，适合喜欢前卫舞曲的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Wild electronic beats wrapped around pop melodies, with experimental sound design — perfect for fans of avant-garde dance music.

releasedThisWeek.title: Together Again
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 两位民谣老将的温暖对话，时间沉淀出的诗意。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A warm dialogue between two folk legends, poetry distilled by time.
releasedThisWeek.summary: John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton的联合专辑，以简约的民谣编排讲述生活与历史，充满人文关怀。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: A collaborative album by John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton, using simple folk arrangements to tell stories of life and history, full of human warmth.

releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X未完成的梦幻篇章，话题与争议并存。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished dream chapter, where hype meets controversy.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 尽管标注为未完成，但Lil Nas X的这张专辑已展现其标志性的跨界融合与大胆叙事，引发广泛讨论。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Though labeled unfinished, this album already showcases Lil Nas X's signature genre-blending and bold storytelling, sparking widespread conversation.

releasedThisWeek.title: Shion. E.P
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 日本地下电子场景的冷冽脉冲，短小精悍的EP杰作。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A cold pulse from Japan's underground electronic scene — a short but potent EP.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Rudo的EP以极简的电子音色和重复性节奏营造出沉浸式氛围，适合深夜聆听。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Rudo's EP creates an immersive atmosphere with minimal electronic textures and repetitive rhythms, perfect for late-night listening.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，经典在时光中回响。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Don McLean live in Manchester 1975 — classics echoing through time.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 记录Don McLean巅峰时期的现场演出，包括《American Pie》等不朽名作，音质与情感俱佳。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Captures Don McLean at his peak, performing timeless classics like 'American Pie' — excellent sound quality and emotional depth.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Power Station
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 同名专辑重启，八十年代摇滚的硬核回归。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A self-titled reboot — hardcore return of 80s rock swagger.
releasedThisWeek.summary: The Power Station同名专辑再版或新作，延续其标志性的节奏组与强劲吉他，复古又生猛。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: A reissue or new work by The Power Station, continuing their signature tight rhythm section and powerful guitar — retro yet raw.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 热带拉丁节拍的狂欢，南美舞池的原始能量。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A carnival of tropical Latin beats — raw energy from South American dance floors.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical带来的哥伦比亚热带音乐，融合cumbia与萨尔萨，节奏感极强。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Colombian tropical music from Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical, blending cumbia and salsa with irresistible rhythm.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower的吉他史诗，蓝调摇滚的现场圣殿。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Robin Trower's guitar epic — a live shrine of blues rock.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Robin Trower在美国的现场录音，精湛的吉他演奏与即兴段落令人叹服，蓝调摇滚迷必收。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: A live recording of Robin Trower in the USA, with stunning guitar work and improvisation — a must-have for blues rock fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2025年现场，即兴与热情的完美共生。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band live in 2025 — a perfect symbiosis of improvisation and passion.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dave Matthews Band最新的现场专辑，收录长达数小时的即兴演奏，展现乐队无与伦比的舞台默契。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: The latest live album from Dave Matthews Band, featuring hours of improvisation and showcasing their unparalleled stage chemistry.

releasedThisWeek.title: Pause for a moment
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 维也纳复古摇摆，一杯爵士调的午后鸡尾酒。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Viennese retro swing — a jazz-flavored afternoon cocktail.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing带来优雅的复古摇摆乐，适合下午茶或小酒馆氛围，精致而放松。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing delivers elegant retro swing, perfect for afternoon tea or bistro vibes — refined and relaxing.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: 流行巨星未完成的梦幻自白，值得一听的碎片美学
upcoming.highlightEn: Pop star's unfinished dream confession, a must-hear fragment aesthetic
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成状态发布的专辑，充满自省与实验气息，打破常规流行专辑的完美叙事。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X releases an unfinished album full of introspection and experimentation, breaking the conventional narrative of polished pop.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: 德国电子大师的极乐幻境，氛围与节奏的完美融合
upcoming.highlightEn: German electronic master's euphoric dreamscape, perfect blend of atmosphere and rhythm
upcoming.summary: Schiller 新作延续其标志性的宏大电子音景，融合古典元素，营造沉浸式的 euphoria 体验。
upcoming.summaryEn: Schiller's new album continues his signature grand electronic soundscapes, blending classical elements for an immersive euphoria.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: 1975年曼彻斯特现场，民谣传奇的时光胶囊
upcoming.highlightEn: Live from Manchester '75, a time capsule of a folk legend
upcoming.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场录音，收录《American Pie》等经典，声音质感还原黄金年代。
upcoming.summaryEn: Live recording of Don McLean in Manchester 1975, featuring classics like 'American Pie,' capturing the golden era's sound.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: 德国海盗民谣的狂野狂欢，手风琴与重金属的碰撞
upcoming.highlightEn: Wild revelry of German pirate folk, accordion meets heavy metal
upcoming.summary: Versengold 将中世纪民谣与重金属结合，手风琴和战吼营造出酒馆狂欢般的独特氛围。
upcoming.summaryEn: Versengold blends medieval folk with heavy metal, using accordion and battle cries to create a tavern-carnival atmosphere.

upcoming.title: Galaxia Tropical
upcoming.highlight: 热带拉丁节拍的隐藏宝藏，哥伦比亚的律动灵魂
upcoming.highlightEn: Hidden gem of tropical Latin beats, the rhythmic soul of Colombia
upcoming.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical 带来纯正的哥伦比亚热带音乐，手风琴与康加鼓交织出阳光般的欢乐。
upcoming.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical delivers authentic Colombian tropical music, with accordion and congas weaving sunny joy.

upcoming.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
upcoming.highlight: 布鲁斯摇滚吉他的现场神迹，Robin Trower 的巅峰时刻
upcoming.highlightEn: Live miracle of blues-rock guitar, Robin Trower at his peak
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower 美国巡演现场，厚重 fuzz 吉他音色与即兴独奏，布鲁斯摇滚迷的必听之作。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower's US tour live, with thick fuzz guitar tones and improvisational solos, a must-listen for blues rock fans.

upcoming.title: RAVEPOP
upcoming.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
upcoming.highlight: 地下电子脉冲的混沌诗篇，噪音与旋律的拉锯战
upcoming.highlightEn: Chaotic poem of underground electronic pulses, tug-of-war between noise and melody
upcoming.summary: r u s s e l b u c k 用碎片化采样和失真节拍构建出迷幻而暴烈的 RAVEPOP 世界。
upcoming.summaryEn: r u s s e l b u c k constructs a psychedelic and violent RAVEPOP world with fragmented samples and distorted beats.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: 两位民谣老将的温情对话，岁月沉淀的友谊之歌
upcoming.highlightEn: Warm dialogue between two folk veterans, songs of friendship aged like fine wine
upcoming.summary: John McCutcheon 与 Tom Paxton 联手，以质朴的吉他和声唱出关于生活与回忆的温暖故事。
upcoming.summaryEn: John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton join forces, singing warm stories of life and memory with simple guitar harmonies.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 80年代超级组合同名回归，放克摇滚的复古炸弹
upcoming.highlightEn: 80s supergroup's self-titled return, a retro bomb of funk rock
upcoming.summary: The Power Station 同名专辑再版或新作，融合放克、舞曲与硬摇滚，充满能量与 groove。
upcoming.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album reissue or new work, blending funk, dance, and hard rock, full of energy and groove.

upcoming.title: Outroom
upcoming.highlight: 工业噪音的深邃迷宫，X-Tram 的暗黑实验
upcoming.highlightEn: Deep maze of industrial noise, X-Tram's dark experimentation
upcoming.summary: X - Tram 的《Outroom》以冷峻的电子音色和扭曲人声，构建出一个令人不安的声学空间。
upcoming.summaryEn: X - Tram's 'Outroom' builds an unsettling acoustic space with cold electronic tones and distorted vocals.

upcoming.title: Shion. E.P
upcoming.highlight: 日本电子氛围的静谧切片，Rudo 的极简 EP
upcoming.highlightEn: Quiet slice of Japanese electronic ambient, Rudo's minimalist EP
upcoming.summary: Rudo 的《Shion. E.P》以细腻的合成器音色和留白美学，营造出冥想般的沉静氛围。
upcoming.summaryEn: Rudo's 'Shion. E.P' creates a meditative stillness with delicate synth tones and the aesthetics of silence.
